reviews.review_description: Playing this game has taken me back to my childhood with an updated twist. The graphics are amazing, and it's an addictive game.

I absolutely love this gem and can't wait to see what future updates hold. This brings back so many memories playing the old version of asteroids back on the old IBM computers. Anyone who loves Mixed Reality would definitely want this in their collection. I love how the levels become progressively challenging but not too difficult, it's nice and balanced. I would love to see options later to remap controls right down to controlling different sound levels such as music and sound effects. The music by the way is also nice without being overwhelming and repetitive, it fits very well. I absolutely love this game and this concept and can't wait to see it expanded upon. Happy Questing, y'all!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the lovely review!! I plan on continuing updates for the game and will definitely take your review into consideration when working on the next release!! Thanks for playing my game. This honestly means the world to me!!!
